meaning: n(阅兵时)飞机编队低空飞行,<英>[交]跨线桥
examples: The flyover broadens into the NLEx expressway.
All that came to his bakery should go over a flyover first.
On the flyover near Balintawak station, I peer down at a chessboard of tin roofs.
Laura Forrest, 15, from Kippen Lodge, Dunning, is thought to have fallen from a flyover.
Even the endless prairie, derided today as "flyover country, " astonished those who first rode across it.
